name: wirenet-manager
description: Set up and run local work memory with personal onboarding, Project Packs, bounded experiments, and explicit persistent goals.

interface.shortDescription: Local work memory and Project Pack routing
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap a content-only local Manager, run a personal first meeting, maintain Manager-native or externally bound Project Packs, learn an optional personal writing voice, run quiet recurring task loops, and explicitly activate persistent UltraGoals without implicit triggering.
capabilities: Run a personal first Manager meeting
Manage Project and Experiment Pack lifecycles
Learn an optional personal writing voice
Search Manager knowledge with optional QMD retrieval
defaultPrompt: Use $wirenet-manager to show my current stack.
Use $wirenet-manager to open my Manager viewer.
Use $wirenet-manager-bootstrap to set up my local Manager.
Use $wirenet-manager-onboarding to start my personal first Manager meeting.
Use $wirenet-manager-project to create or manage a project or experiment.
Use $wirenet-manager-bootstrap to check and upgrade my existing Manager.
Use $loop to keep checking this task until its stop condition is met.
Use $write-like-me-bootstrap to learn my writing voice from approved sent messages.
Use $ultragoal to explicitly activate a persistent goal.
